dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, as if things were not bad enough. While you were helping us {quest_action}, {quest_threat_the} worsened and brought new problems.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_ally} says the disruption near {quest_focus_the} has attracted even more {enemy_type_plural} {location_hint}. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} running dangerously low on time. We need you to kill the new arrivals before they entrench.
dialogueChunks.outro: Misfortune compounds misfortune. But we have to keep fighting.

dialogueChunks.intro: More misfortune, {player_name}. Your work to {quest_action} was going well until a second wave of {quest_threat_the} undid half your progress.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: {quest_focus_The} {quest_focus_has} been hit again. The {enemy_type_plural} you drove off last time have returned in greater numbers {location_hint}. {quest_stakes_human_The} {quest_stakes_human_is} in desperate need of protection.
dialogueChunks.outro: I know this feels like pushing a boulder uphill. But we are close: one more effort.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, I hate to ask again. Since you began to {quest_action}, we discovered that {quest_threat_the} caused hidden damage to {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The weakened structure has become a beacon for {enemy_type_plural} {location_hint}. {quest_ally} found the damage runs deeper than the surface, and the creatures are burrowing into the foundations. We need them killed before {quest_focus_the} collapses entirely.
dialogueChunks.outro: Without your help, {quest_stakes_the} will be lost to nothing more than bad luck and bad timing.

dialogueChunks.intro: The bad luck just will not stop, {player_name}. A rockslide exposed a den of {enemy_type_plural} that no one knew was there.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: They spilled out of the hillside near {quest_focus_the} and went straight for the damaged areas {location_hint}. {quest_ally} says they are territorial and will not leave without a fight. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} in their path.
dialogueChunks.outro: Drive them back underground or kill them. We cannot afford another setback.

dialogueChunks.intro: {player_name}, the {enemy_type_plural} have turned opportunistic. They are no longer just lurking near {quest_focus_the}: they are actively raiding.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Since your efforts to {quest_action}, the creatures learned that we are weakened. They struck a supply wagon {location_hint} and now they are bolder than ever. {quest_ally} says if we do not hit them hard and fast, they will keep pushing until {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} lost.
dialogueChunks.outro: Make them fear us again. Hunt them down and kill every one you find near the routes.

dialogueChunks.intro: Just when we thought the worst was over, {player_name}. A freak storm drove a pack of {enemy_type_plural} straight toward {quest_focus_the}.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The creatures are sheltering in the same ruins we need to rebuild {location_hint}. {quest_ally} says they will not leave on their own: the ruins provide too much cover. {quest_stakes_The} {quest_stakes_is} stalled until we clear them out.
dialogueChunks.outro: Every day those creatures squat in our ruins is a day we fall further behind. Flush them out.
